texto: 6 Reasons Why You Should Be A Cat: 1) Free Food. 2) Free Rent. 3) Sleep As Long As You Want. 4) Look Great With No Effort. 5) Toes Look Like Beans. 6) License to Kill!
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Pusheen the Cat: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “6 Reasons Why You Should Be A Cat: 1) Free Food. 2) Free Rent. 3) Sleep As Long As You Want. 4) L…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, humorous-quotes, reasons pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
